summary: Iteration 47: Tested Gyroscope/DeviceOrientation support for Star Chart and Plant auto-watering from wellness activities. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Gyro toggle button visible, hint text includes 'Gyro for AR mode', Stargazing Journey/Mythology/Badges buttons working, Zen Garden shows plants with watered_today status, Cosmic Meditations shows all 12 constellation themes.
seed_data_creation: Test user has 8 plants (Sacred Lotus x2, Lucky Bamboo, Zen Bonsai, Peace Fern, White Sage, plus 2 more). All plants show 'Watered Today' status from auto-watering tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gyroscope feature verified - toggle button exists with data-testid='gyro-toggle', hint text shows 'Gyro for AR mode'. Note: DeviceOrientation cannot be tested in headless browsers. Auto-watering feature verified - POST /api/meditation-history/log and POST /api/daily-challenge/complete both return plant_growth field. Zen Garden shows plants with correct watered_today status. All 12 constellation themes displayed in Cosmic Meditations.

gyroscope_star_chart.Gyro toggle button (data-testid='gyro-to: PASS - visible in Star Chart toolbar

auto_watering_from_wellness.GET /api/zen-garden/plants shows watered: PASS - all plants show watered_today status
